Talentless: This is Mariah at Talentless. Thank you for reaching out. Happy to help you find the right size! Our clothes run true to size, and I'd recommend taking a look at our size guide here: https://talentless.attn.tv/aGDmZa6EdTsc. Do you mind sharing your height and chest width?

As it saying items are final sale, please note that final sale items are final and are not eligible for returns, refunds, or exchanges. You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://talentless.attn.tv/ahF-yDuYZbWZ

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

Hello, I ordered the Take Your Time jumpsuit set black/combo and it arrived yesterday, however, before I could open the package, I smelled a very bad odor that was coming from inside the package. I opened the package up and there was a strong fishy odor that filled the room. I always order from Fashionnova, and I've never had any problems with bad smells but this is the first time, I've had a bad-smelling package delivered to me. I'm going to return this outfit. I was planning on reordering a size down XL  because the 1X was too large but I don't want another bad-smelling package coming to my house.    I'm very disappointed.

Fashion Nova: Hello, thanks for reaching out! I'm very sorry to hear about the unpleasant odor in your package and the disappointment it caused. This concern will be best handled by visiting http://sms.fashionnova.com/aJaHQ4jDhacU and starting an inquiry with our team.
Hello, does FashionNova have a telephone number that I can call? I would rather speak with someone over the phone instead of texting.

Fashion Nova: I understand your concern. We do not currently offer phone support at this time, but you can always reach out to our team via the link I sent in my previous message. Our team is happy to help!

Okay, when  I click the link it doesn't connect you to customer service. I want to speak with someone about resolving this issue. I don't see anywhere on the link you sent me that starts a conversation with customer service. It just shows you how to start the process for a return. That's not speaking with customer service.

Fashion Nova: I'm sorry to hear for the confusion! Please submit your inquiry via this link instead: http://sms.fashionnova.com/aAQ_kNEEWU4W Just select the option "Something Else" and then select the same option again. After submitting, the team will get back to you via email as soon as they can. Thank you for your cooperation.
